title: Revenue Orchestration Protocol
requirements: Multi-region payment gateway switching (Stripe, Fawry, Vodafone Cash).
Currency normalization (EGP, SAR, AED, USD) based on shard location.
Law 151 compliant financial auditing and data residency.
Automated payout reconciliation for distributed candidate projects.

logic.routing: Direct transactions to regional payment endpoints based on shard geo-tag.
logic.settlement: Aggregate global revenues into the Sovereign Treasury node.
logic.reporting: Generate real-time ROI metrics for the Predictive Engine.

compliance.taxation: Apply regional VAT/Sales Tax based on shard jurisdiction.
